have h1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      calc t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl
        _ ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (Nat.le_max_left _ _)
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      calc t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
        _ ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
    omega

have h1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
    have hmax1 : t₁.height ≤ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.le_max_left _ _
    have hmax2 : t₂.height ≤ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.le_max_right _ _
    have hp1 : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) hmax1
    have hp2 : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) hmax2
    have hs1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le h1 hp1
    have hs2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le h2 hp2
    calc 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size 
        ≤ 1 + (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) - 1) + (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) - 1) := by omega
      _ = 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) - 1 := by omega
      _ < 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by omega
      _ = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by ring

have h1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le ihl (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (Nat.le_max_left _ _))
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le ihr (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (Nat.le_max_right _ _))
    have h3 : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by omega
    calc 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size 
        ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size + 1 := by omega
      _ ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size + 1 := Nat.le_refl _
      _ < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by omega
      _ = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by ring
  }

have h1 : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (Nat.le_max_left _ _)
    have h2 : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
    have h3 : 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) = 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by ring
    omega

have h1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
    have h3 : t₁.height ≤ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.le_max_left _ _
    have h4 : t₂.height ≤ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.le_max_right _ _
    have h5 : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) h3
    have h6 : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) h4
    have h7 : t₁.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le h1 h5
    have h8 : t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le h2 h6
    have h9 : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := Nat.add_lt_add h7 h8
    have h10 : 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      rw [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_two]
    omega

have h1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := 
      Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le ihl (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (Nat.le_max_left _ _))
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := 
      Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le ihr (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (Nat.le_max_right _ _))
    have h3 : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by omega
    calc 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size 
        ≤ 1 + (t₁.size + t₂.size) := by omega
      _ < 1 + 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by omega
      _ ≤ 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by 
          have : 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) ≥ 1 := Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (by omega)
          omega
      _ = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by ring

have h1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
    have h3 : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num : 1 ≤ 2)
      exact Nat.le_max_left _ _
    have h4 : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num : 1 ≤ 2)
      exact Nat.le_max_right _ _
    have h5 : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      omega
    have h6 : 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      ring_nf
      omega
    omega

have h1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := 
      Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le ihl (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num : 1 ≤ 2) (Nat.le_max_left _ _))
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := 
      Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le ihr (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num : 1 ≤ 2) (Nat.le_max_right _ _))
    have h3 : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      omega
    calc 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size 
        ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size + 1 := by omega
      _ ≤ t₁.size + t₂.size + 1 := by omega
      _ < 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by omega
      _ = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by ring

have h1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := 
      Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le ihl (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (Nat.le_max_left _ _))
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := 
      Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le ihr (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (Nat.le_max_right _ _))
    have h3 : 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) = 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      ring_nf
      rw [Nat.pow_succ]
    rw [h3]
    omega
